topic: Area C: The World Around Us
subject: french

items.why: Students guess from a similar-looking word; 'recyclage' is recycling, a core environment term.

items.q: How do you correctly say 'it is sunny'?
items.why: Students use 'être' or first person; French weather uses 'il fait' + adjective.

items.q: Which is a greener form of transport?
items.why: Students don't link vocabulary to the environment theme; cycling and public transport reduce pollution.

items.q: Which sentence describes the weather correctly?
items.why: The answer examiners want is: Il fait beau aujourd'hui.. “Il fait beau hier.” is the distractor this question was built around — if it tempted you, that's the exact gap to close.

items.q: 'La pollution de l'air' is mainly caused by:
items.why: The answer examiners want is: Traffic and industry. “Recycling” is the distractor this question was built around — if it tempted you, that's the exact gap to close.
